column1: # id | severity | target-glob | pattern | exclude | doctrine-ref | promotion-blocker

B3-BUFFER-ESCAPE | RELIABLE | crates/simthing-kernel/src/** | pub fn [a-z_]+\(&self\) *-> *&(wgpu::)?Buffer|^\s*pub [a-z_]+ *: *Buffer|-> *BindingResource | pub\(crate\);compile_fail;^\s*//!;^\s*///;^\s*// | design §5 B3 buffer escape | retire when buffer accessors are crate-private type boundary only

FORGE-MINTERS | RELIABLE | crates/simthing-kernel/src/** | pub fn (from_boundary_delivery|for_kernel_readback|for_boundary_install)\b | compile_fail;^\s*//!;^\s*///;^\s*// | design §5 forge minters | retire when sealed-producer allowlist scan (CI-A-ALLOWLIST-SCANS-0) subsumes explicit forge names

UNSAFE-FN | RELIABLE | crates/simthing-{kernel,sim}/src/** | \bunsafe fn\b | compile_fail;^\s*//!;^\s*///;^\s*// | design §5 unsafe fn | retire when unsafe is unrepresentable at kernel/sim type boundary
UNSAFE-ALLOW-ATTR | RELIABLE | crates/simthing-{kernel,sim}/src/lib.rs | #!\[allow\(unsafe_code\)\] |  | design §5 allow unsafe attr | retire when crate attributes are admission-typed not prose

UNSAFE-FORBID-ATTR | RELIABLE | crates/simthing-{kernel,sim}/src/lib.rs | @REQUIRE:#!\[forbid\(unsafe_code\)\] |  | design §5 forbid unsafe attr | retire when semantic-free crate template enforces forbid at type boundary

AS5-COLUMN-ALIAS | RELIABLE | crates/**/src/** | type ColumnIndex *= *usize | compile_fail;^\s*//!;^\s*///;^\s*// | design §5 AS-5 ColumnIndex alias | retire when ColumnIndex is a kernel-wide newtype everywhere
DENY-TOML-STUB | RELIABLE | deny.toml | . |  | design §0.6.6 deny.toml stub | retire when dependency policy is compile-time typed not file-shaped

RAW-DATA-INDEX | HEURISTIC | crates/**/src/** | \.data\[[0-9]+\] | raw_lanes;serialization;compile_fail;^\s*//!;^\s*///;^\s*// | design §5 raw data[N] index | promote when lane indices are newtyped at all serialization sites

SIM-KIND-READ | HEURISTIC | crates/simthing-sim/src/** | match .*\.kind|\.kind\b | compile_fail;^\s*//!;^\s*///;^\s*//;delta_log;sim_runtime_tree;kind_production_audit;^\s*assert_|^\s*#\[test\] | design §5 sim .kind read | promote when runtime tree view is kind-free at type boundary

SEMANTIC-WORDS | HEURISTIC | crates/simthing-{sim,kernel}/src/** | faction|combat|terran|pirate|diplomacy | compile_fail;^\s*//!;^\s*///;^\s*//;^\s*assert_|^\s*#\[test\]|SimThingKind:: | design §5 semantic words below spec | promote when game semantics are spec-boundary typed only

SPEC-STRING-CHANNEL | HEURISTIC | crates/simthing-spec/src/** | owner_ref *: *(Option<)?String|resource_key *: *(Option<)?String | compile_fail;^\s*//!;^\s*///;^\s*//;channel_key\.rs | design §5 stringly channel identity | promote when channel identity is newtyped in spec admission
